name: Spinehail
implicitMods: Gain 15% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
explicitMods: 7 to 19 Added Physical Damage with Bow Attacks
Increases and Reductions to Minion Damage also affect you
Bow Attacks Sacrifice a random Damageable Minion to fire 3 additional Arrows
flavourText: Enacting a grand vision requires cold-hearted sacrifice.
The loyal must be no more than fodder against the unwilling.

name: Victory Mark
explicitMods: 25% chance to Impale Enemies on Hit with Attacks

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies, making those hits penetrate enemy elemental resistances.

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

Enemies Chilled by Supported Skills increase Cold Damage taken by Chill Effect

Supported Skills deal 14% more Cold Damage

socketedItems.secDescrText: Fires an arrow into the air to land at a targeted location, dealing area damage. The arrow sticks in the ground where it lands, and periodically fires a beam of lightning to another arrow near it, dealing area damage between them.
explicitMods: 50% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Mageblood
explicitMods: Magic Utility Flasks cannot be Used
Leftmost 4 Magic Utility Flasks constantly apply their Flask Effects to you
Magic Utility Flask Effects cannot be removed
flavourText: Rivers of power course through your veins.

typeLine: Dabbler's Quicksilver Flask of the Cheetah
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Quill Rain
flavourText: "The rain of a thousand quills that whittle
present into past, life into death."
- Rigwald of the Ezomytes

craftedMods: 30% increased Rarity of Items found during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Circle of Guilt
explicitMods: Herald of Purity has 60% increased Buff Effect
69% increased Physical Damage while affected by Herald of Purity
flavourText: I feel the moral weight of what I must do to protect Wraeclast.
I accept my guilt without shame. It is my gift to humanity.

name: Torment Curio
explicitMods: 1% chance to receive additional Blight items when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
2% chance to receive additional Gold when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
Smuggler's Caches have 6% chance to Duplicate contained Rogue's Markers
Monsters have 5% chance to Duplicate dropped Rogue's Marker

name: Marylene's Fallacy
flavourText: "Marylene stroked the medallion at her breast
before every duel and every cast of the die."
- Victario, the People's Poet

name: Heatshiver
implicitMods: Socketed Skill Gems get a 90% Cost & Reservation Multiplier
explicitMods: Gain 1% of Cold Damage as Extra Fire Damage per 1% Chill Effect on Enemy
Gain 30% of Cold Damage as Extra Fire Damage against Frozen Enemies
flavourText: Give of your heated passions.
Give of your cold resolve.
You will be repaid.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will apply a cost & reservation multiplier to supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff which lets you deal more physical damage. When you kill an enemy while you have this buff, this skill will summon a Sentinel of Purity, or refresh the duration and life of an existing one instead if you have the maximum number of them. The Sentinels of Purity have a single-target melee attack and an area melee attack.
explicitMods: Summon a Sentinel of Purity when you Kill an Enemy
20% chance to Summon a Sentinel of Purity when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Buffs you, and affects nearby enemies with an aura, differently depending on your stance. Both stances are more impactful against enemies closer to you. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.
explicitMods: While in Blood Stance, Aura makes Enemies take up to 20% more Physical Damage from Hits
While in Sand Stance, Buff makes you take up to 20% less Damage from Enemies in Aura
